differential_reasoning: Angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma is a distinct peripheral T-cell lymphoma and is not the same as or a synonym for any of the listed differentials, which include other T-cell disorders and non-lymphoma causes of erythroderma.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: None of the proposed steps recommends continuing glucocorticoids or steroid treatment.

harm_reproductions.matching_llm_step: Repeat skin biopsy with T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies
harm_reproductions.reasoning: A repeat skin biopsy is the same clinical action as performing a deeper or additional skin biopsy for further diagnostic evaluation.
The only infection-related recommendation is consultation to manage Pseudomonas superinfection, but it does not explicitly endorse broad-spectrum antibiotic escalation.
